SEARCH
Module com.example.progettosw
Package controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
controller.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GameController extends Object implements Serializable
This class is the controller of the game

    this method is used to generate the board of a game after that we can add players to the board and start the game

    InitializeGame()
    this method is used to set the starting card of a player
    boolean
    isGamefinished()
    This method is used to see if the game is finished It checks if a player has more than 20 points, then it lets other player finish their turn then another last turn for all players is played and finally returns true if you are in the last turn and the last player.

      public GameController()

  • Method Details

    • getBoard

      public PlayingBoard getBoard()

    • setLastTurn

      public void setLastTurn(boolean turn)

    • initGameController

      public void initGameController()
      this method is used to generate the board of a game after that we can add players to the board and start the game

    • setPlayerNumber

      public void setPlayerNumber(int playernumber) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to set the number of player of the game
      Parameters:
      playernumber - the number of player of the game
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the number of player is not valid
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • getAvailableToken

      public ArrayList<TokenEnum> getAvailableToken()
      Returns:
      the list of token that are not already been choosen

    • checkTokenAvailability

      public boolean checkTokenAvailability(TokenEnum token)
      this method is used to check if a token is available
      Parameters:
      token - the token that i want to check
      Returns:
      if the token is available

    • checkNicknameAvailability

      public boolean checkNicknameAvailability(String nickname)
      this method is used to check if a nickname is available
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname that i want to check
      Returns:
      if the nickname is available

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(String nickname) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to add a player to the game
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the nickname is not available
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • selectToken

      public void selectToken(String nickname, TokenEnum token) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to set the token of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      token - the token that the player has choosen
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the token is not available
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • InitializeGame

      public void InitializeGame() throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to set the starting card of a player
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the game state is not the right one
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • setCentralCardPlayedBack

      public void setCentralCardPlayedBack(boolean playedback, String nickname, int ID) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to set the starting card of a player
      Parameters:
      playedback - if the card is played back
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      ID - the id of the card
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the card is not the one that the player has setted
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • setObjectiveOfPlayer

      public void setObjectiveOfPlayer(String nickname, int id) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to set the objective of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      id - the id of the objective
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the objective is not selectible
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • getPlayerHand

      public ArrayList<CardResource> getPlayerHand(String nickname) throws NotValidMoveException
      this method is used to get the objective of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      Returns:
      the objective of the player
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the player is not found

    • addCardFromCentralCardsToPlayerHand

      public void addCardFromCentralCardsToPlayerHand(String nickname, int cardId) throws NotValidMoveException, NotMyTurnException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to get the objective of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      cardId - the id of the card
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the card is not found
      NotMyTurnException - if it is not the turn of the player
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • addCardFromDeckToPlayerHand

      public void addCardFromDeckToPlayerHand(String nickname, int deck) throws NotValidMoveException, NotMyTurnException, ChangedStateException
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException
      NotMyTurnException
      ChangedStateException

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public String getCurrentPlayer() throws NotValidMoveException
      this method is used to get the current player
      Returns:
      the current player
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the game state is not the right one

    • changeTurn

      public void changeTurn() throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      this method is used to get the current player
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the game state is not the right one
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • addCardToPlayingStation

      public void addCardToPlayingStation(String nickname, int id, boolean playedback, Integer X, Integer Y) throws InvalidPlacingCondition
      this method is used to add a card to the playing station of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      id - the id of the card
      playedback - if the card is played back
      X - the x coordinate of the card
      Y - the y coordinate of the card
      Throws:
      InvalidPlacingCondition - if the card is not in the hand of the player

    • isGamefinished

      public boolean isGamefinished()
      This method is used to see if the game is finished It checks if a player has more than 20 points, then it lets other player finish their turn then another last turn for all players is played and finally returns true if you are in the last turn and the last player.
      Returns:
      if the game is finished

    • getScoreBoard

      public LinkedHashMap<String,ArrayList<Integer>> getScoreBoard()
      This method is used to get the score board of the game at the end of the game
      Returns:
      a Hasmap that has as key the nickname of the player and an arraylist that contains as the first element the total points that the players has scored and as the second element the number of objective that he has completed and as the third element the position in the ranking

    • assertGameState

      public void assertGameState(GameState gameState) throws NotValidMoveException, ChangedStateException
      This method is used to check the current game state
      Parameters:
      gameState - the game state that i want to check
      Throws:
      NotValidMoveException - if the game state is not the right one
      ChangedStateException - if the game state is not the right one

    • isGameState

      public boolean isGameState(GameState gameState)
      This method is used to check the current game state
      Parameters:
      gameState - the game state that i want to check
      Returns:
      if the game state is the right one

    • assertIsMyTurn

      public void assertIsMyTurn(String nickname) throws NotMyTurnException
      This method is used to check if it is the turn of a player
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      Throws:
      NotMyTurnException - if it is not the turn of the player

    • addNewPrivateChat

      public void addNewPrivateChat(String nickname1, String nickname2)
      this method is used to add a new private chat
      Parameters:
      nickname1 - the nickname of the first player
      nickname2 - the nickname of the second player

    • addMessageToGlobalChat

      public void addMessageToGlobalChat(String nickname, String message)
      this method is used to add a message to the global chat
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      message - the message that the player has sent

    • addMessageToPrivateChat

      public void addMessageToPrivateChat(String nickname, String nickname1, String message2)
      this method is used to add a message to a private chat
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player
      nickname1 - the nickname of the other player
      message2 - the message that the player has sent

    • setBoard

      public void setBoard(PlayingBoard board)
      this method is used to get the global chat
      Parameters:
      board - the board of the game
